WardrobeItem.title: WardrobeItem
WardrobeItem.description: An item in the user's wardrobe with its story and rating.

userId.description: The UID of the user who owns this item.

name.description: The name of the clothing item.

season.description: The season the item is best suited for.

rating.description: The user's rating for the item, typically out of 10.

story.description: The story or description behind the item.

imageUrl.description: The URL of the uploaded image for the item.

createdAt.description: The time the item was created.

updatedAt.description: The time the item was last updated.

/wardrobe_items/{itemId}.description: A collection of wardrobe items belonging to users.
